sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Combinational fixed-point initial estimate generator. It detects zero input and otherwise chooses max(X, 1.0) as a safe Newton-Raphson starting point.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration: Combinational Newton-Raphson iteration datapath implementing y_next = (y_current + X/y_current)/2 with fixed-point scaling, rounded averaging, divide-by-zero protection, and output saturation.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Combinational convergence detector that compares successive Newton-Raphson estimates and asserts when their absolute difference is within a configurable fixed-point tolerance.
